description_long: This is a disposable paper coffee cup with a white plastic lid, commonly found in urban environments such as coffee shops or on city sidewalks. The cup features a light blue sleeve with a stylized bird logo and some faint text, likely for branding or safety information. The main body of the cup is a muted brown color, while the sleeve wraps around most of its circumference, providing insulation and grip. The lid is slightly domed and fits snugly on top, designed to prevent spills and retain heat. The cup tapers smoothly from a wide rim to a narrower base, making it easy to hold in one hand. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with subtle branding and a practical design for on-the-go use.
description: A disposable paper coffee cup with a white plastic lid and a light blue branded sleeve, featuring a stylized bird logo. The cup is brown with a modern, practical design for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light blue sleeve with a prominent stylized bird logo and the white plastic lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the sleeve's text, 'CONTENTS MAY BE HOT', and the continuation of the blue sleeve around the cup.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly plain blue sleeve visible, minimal branding or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the cup, showing the edge of the sleeve and a mostly plain surface.
